title: Roleplayer's Baubles
description: Baubles that grant you certain abilities
body:
This mod adds 16 baubles that grant unique abilities. This mod is targeted towards players who roleplay as creatures in my mod, Creatures of SonariaCraft. These baubles mimic the abilities of the creatures. However, anyone is welcome to use this mod!

 

Baubles:

Bauble of Flight: Upon jumping, the player can take flight.

Bauble for Aquatics: Grants water-breathing and dolphin's grace when in the water and slowness on land.

Bauble for Semi-Aquatics: Upon right-clicking, this grants water-breathing as long as the player is not underwater.

Bauble for Healers: Right-clicking other entities gives them regeneration.

Bauble of Fire: Grants permanent fire-resistance, and attackers are burned each time they hit the player.

Bauble of Toxicity: Grants immunity to poison, nausea, and wither. Attackers are poisoned each time they attack the player.

Bauble of Fear: Has a 40% chance of causing blindness to attackers, but it also gives the attackers a speed boost.

Bauble of Sleepiness: Has a 30% chance to paralyze attackers each time the player is hit. (Defensive paralyze creatures can also use this)

Bauble of Life Leech: Has a 30% chance to deal extra damage to attackers and give the player regeneration.

Bauble of Warden's Rage: Has a 20% chance to grant the player a speed and strength boost upon being attacked.

Bauble for Nocturnals: Grants the player permanent night vision.

Bauble for Photovores: Grants the Photovore debuff (weakness when the sun isn't out).

Bauble of Frostbite: Has a 30% chance to give attackers slowness each time the player is attacked.

Bauble of Invisibility: Grants the player invisibility for a few seconds as long as their hunger is above 15.

Bauble of Explosion: Summons an explosion as long as the player's hunger is above 15. Each use will halve the player's health and hunger (not including the explosion damage). These explosions do not damage blocks.

Bauble of Venom: Attacking an entity poisons them.
